scripts.build: cd packages/shared && npm run build && cd ../agent-core && npm run build && cd ../skills && npm run build && cd ../cron && npm run build && cd ../agent-sdk && npm run build && cd ../agent-template && npm run build && cd ../llm-provider && npm run build && cd ../agent-from-dir && npm run build && cd ../tui && npm run build && cd ../gateway && npm run build && cd ../../apps/gateway && npm run build && cd ../agent && npm run build
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "cli,server" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "cd apps/agent-cli && npm run dev" "cd apps/agent-server && npm run dev"
scripts.check: biome check --write --error-on-warnings packages apps && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.version:patch: npm version patch -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/node_modules package-lock.json && npm install
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/node_modules package-lock.json && npm install
scripts.version:major: npm version major -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/node_modules package-lock.json && npm install
scripts.test:gateway-e2e: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/test-gateway-e2e.ts
scripts.test:scenario: npm run build && npx tsx scripts/test-scenario-stock-agent.ts
